name: hermes-agent-design
description: Hermes harness design, review, and discovery workflows for agent-native systems.

interface.shortDescription: Design and review Hermes agent systems.
interface.longDescription: Bundle harness design, agent-native review, best-practice doctrine, and Hermes skill discovery into one reusable Codex plugin.
defaultPrompt: Use $hermes-harness-builder to design a Hermes harness for this repo.
Use $hermes-agent-native-reviewer to audit this Hermes workflow.
Use $hermes-skill-discovery to find Hermes skills for this use case.
